name: Brandied Rabbit in Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Rabbit, cut up for frying
1 medium Onion, cut into four pieces
recipeInstructions:
See Bouquet garni recipe for ingredients.
Calories: 311; Protein 27 g.; Carbohydrate 3 g.; Fat 21 g/serving.
Wipe meat pieces and trim off any excess fat. Heat olive oil and butter or margarine in a large skillet until bubbling. Add the meat pieces and sauté on all sides until browned. While browning, press whole cloves into onion chunks (generously). Add the onion chunks to the skillet between the meat pieces; add bouquet garni. Sprinkle with salt. Generously pour brandy over top (at least 1/2 cup). Cover and cook over medium-low heat for about 30 minutes or until the meat is cooked through. Remove the meat pieces from the pan and keep warm. Discard onion chunks, cloves, and bouquet garni. Increase the heat to medium-high. Add cream and mustard; cook, stirring constantly until slightly thickened. Return the meat to the pan and coat on all sides with the sauce. Serve immediately.
